title: I was giving my coding agent context the wrong way...
summary: AI Jason discusses best practices for giving coding agents context, suggesting there is a wrong way and implying a correct approach. The video references a codebase harness tool and positions context management as an engineering concern for agent systems.
writeup: AI Jason revisits how coding agents receive context, arguing that common practices amount to a wrong way and pointing toward a more deliberate approach. The video treats context management as an engineering problem for agent systems rather than ad hoc prompting, and it references a codebase harness tool as part of that setup. The core takeaway: how context reaches a coding agent is a design decision, not an afterthought.
